title: Flaky Argentinian Mustard Greens Stir-fry
description: A show-off Argentinean dish featuring mustard powder in a floral and flaky flavor profile that is whole30-friendly and perfect for your dinner table.
instructions: Clean and chop mustard greens into bite-sized pieces.
Peel onions, garlic, and red peppers. Dice all vegetables.
In a pan over medium heat, add olive oil, then sauté onions until translucent.
Add garlic and red peppers to the pan, stir for about 2 minutes or until soft.
Fold in mustard greens and sprinkle with mustard powder. Stir well to combine.
Pour lime juice into the pan. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Cook for another 5-7 minutes or until all vegetables are tender and nicely flavored.
